summary: The diff addresses REQ-23 and REQ-24 by fixing the login flow in ChatView (visible login button, error handling, graceful cancellation), adding actor-readiness guards in ProfileSetupModal and DisplayNamePrompt, and updating useQueries to gate queries on actor availability. Most acceptance criteria are covered. However, the explicit retry mechanism for actor initialisation failure (REQ-24 AC: retry mechanism) is not clearly implemented — the code guards against null actors and shows error messages but no automatic retry logic is evident. The constraint about not modifying useInternetIdentity.ts or useActor.ts directly appears respected.

missing_requirements.requirement: If the actor fails to initialise after login, add a retry mechanism so the actor is retried within a reasonable time (e.g., 5 seconds).
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows actor-readiness guards and user-facing error messages in ProfileSetupModal and DisplayNamePrompt, but no automatic retry mechanism for actor initialisation failure is visible in any modified file. The useActor hook itself is not modified (per constraints), and no wrapper component introducing retry logic appears in the diff.
